value.reason: The page clearly documents the subagent / delegated-agent capability for OpenAI's Codex, so documents_capability=true and the label "Subagent Workflows" is supported by the page's own heading and terminology. However, the description contains one materially inaccurate claim: it states that "Developers trigger this implicitly by submitting complex tasks to Codex rather than wiring up agents manually." The page explicitly and repeatedly states the opposite — "Codex only spawns subagents when you explicitly ask it to" and "Codex only spawns a new agent when you explicitly ask it to do so." The implicit/automatic triggering claim is directly contradicted by the documentation, making description_ok=false.
